name: web-frontend-tooling
description: Blueprint for wiring up linting, formatting, type-checking, Git hooks, and dead-code detection in a Node/TypeScript project. Prefers the Oxc toolchain (oxlint + oxfmt) with husky + lint-staged, but adapts to existing ESLint/Prettier setups. Imposes no specific rules — supplies minimal starting configs and reconciles with the target codebase.
